visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white rib-knit long-sleeved top, holds two small bunny figurines—one light blue and one cream—near her face. She smiles and looks directly into the lens under bright, even indoor lighting against a neutral indoor background. (2) The camera transitions to a top-down view of the two figurines on a beige table surface. A hand enters the frame holding a white alcohol wipe and proceeds to thoroughly clean the exterior of both small textured bunny characters. (3) One hand wraps a white satin ribbon featuring the gold 'DIOR' logo around the blue bunny's middle, tying it into a small bow. A pair of metal scissors enters the frame to precisely snip the excess ribbon ends. (4) The hand places the decorated blue bunny and a pink flower-shaped cosmetic item into a transparent plastic gift bag adorned with small yellow dots. The objects are arranged neatly within the packaging as the top flap is folded. (5) The creator seals the gift bag and applies a small square sticker of a pink cartoon character to the front center. She then lifts the completed gift package, showing it off to the viewer while maintaining the close-up top-down perspective.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 太酷了領養一隻 😂. [Logo]: stanxch님에게 답글 남기는 중. [Subtitle]: 真的可以給 記得私訊給我 還有一些誰要？可留言🫶. (2) [Variety]: ( 消毒一下 ). (3) [Variety]: 變漂亮一下. (4) [Subtitle]: 只給拉發霉會太過份 所以一起送韓國唇彩💗. (5) [Subtitle]: 想要的人請在底下留言喔👍.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character presenting and packaging items.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with long black hair, wearing a white long-sleeved rib-knit top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple indoor setting with white walls and a light beige flat surface used for packaging.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-tempo electronic music with a driving, heavy bass kick starts immediately. No vocals are present. The music has a dark, aggressive Phonk-style texture with repetitive synthesized percussive elements. (2) A loud, sharp crinkle of plastic occurs as a package is opened, followed by the wet, squelching sound of a moist wipe being pulled out. The music continues at a steady 140 BPM. (3) The sound of a wipe rubbing against plastic create a soft, consistent high-frequency friction noise. The electronic beat remains the dominant auditory layer, maintaining its rhythmic intensity. (4) A distinct metallic 'snip' sound is heard as scissors cut through ribbon, followed by the recurring, crackling rustle of a thin plastic gift bag being manipulated and filled. (5) High-frequency crinkling and rustling sounds continue as the plastic bag is sealed with adhesive. The music maintains its energy until the final second, ending abruptly on a beat.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The creator is showcasing the preparation and packaging of small gifts (bunny figurines and lip tint) to be given away to followers who interact with the video. It uses a high-energy trending audio style to maintain engagement.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While a Dior ribbon is used, it appears to be upcycled for packaging rather than an official endorsement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video blends aesthetic DIY/packaging content with a social media giveaway trend, using popular Phonk music to appeal to a younger audience.
